archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon / Futuristic) blended with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
vibe: Medical sci-fi (deep teal + holographic glass), high-tech, precise, safe, HUD-style

layout_patterns.glass_card: bg-[#051A26]/80 border border-[#00F0FF]/15 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-md overflow-hidden
layout_patterns.hud_panel: bg-transparent border border-[#00F0FF]/20 rounded-lg p-4 relative
layout_patterns.hud_corner_accents: Absolute positioned small L-shaped borders at corners of HUD panels using cyan tint

buttons.primary: bg-[#00F0FF]/10 border border-[#00F0FF] text-[#00F0FF] rounded-lg py-3 px-6 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white rounded-lg py-3 px-6 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF3366]/10 border border-[#FF3366] text-[#FF3366] rounded-lg py-3 px-6 font-bold uppercase shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,51,102,0.2)]

inputs.text_field: bg-[#020B14] border border-white/10 rounded-lg p-4 text-white placeholder-[#507596] focus:border-[#00F0FF] focus:bg-[#00F0FF]/5
inputs.dropdown: bg-[#020B14] border border-white/10 rounded-lg p-4 text-white

widgets.trolley_status: Glass card with grid layout showing battery, wifi, next dose timer. Use mono font for timers.
widgets.compartment_grid: Grid of 2x3 or 3x3 squares. Empty: border-white/10. Loaded: border-[#00F0FF]/30 bg-[#00F0FF]/5. Active/Dispensing: pulse animation, border-[#00FF9D] bg-[#00FF9D]/20
widgets.dose_alert_modal: Fullscreen overlay with deep blur. Center card heavily glowing cyan or red depending on status. Large typography for 'Time for Medication'. Button to 'Confirm Taken' in neon spring.

motion_and_interactions.pulse_animation: For active compartments or next dose timers, use a slow breathing opacity pulse (0.4 to 1.0) on the border/shadow.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Smooth fade in with slight upward slide (10px).
motion_and_interactions.button_press: Scale down to 0.95 and increase opacity of inner background tint.

login.layout: Full height, centered content. Background image with deep blur overlay.
login.elements: Logo (futuristic icon), Role selection tabs (Caregiver | Patient) with glowing active state, Email/Password inputs, Primary Login button.

dashboard.layout: ScrollView with sticky header. Header shows user profile and trolley connection status (green dot).
sections: Hero Widget: Next Dose countdown (huge numbers, glowing)
Compartments Grid: Visual representation of physical trolley
Recent Activity List: Minimal list of recent doses taken/missed

schedule_management.layout: List view of time slots and assigned medicines.
schedule_management.elements: Glass cards for each dose slot. 'Add Dose' floating action button with cyan glow.

dose_alert_modal.elements: Pulsing background alert, Voice playback visualizer (bars animating), 'TAKEN', 'SNOOZE', 'SKIP' buttons.

history_analytics.elements: Adherence ring chart (using svg or charts library, cyan for taken, red for missed), Weekly bar chart, History log.

images.description: Deep blue abstract pattern for subtle background texture when heavily blurred and darkened.
Vibrant light trails for dynamic splash screen background.
Nurse smiling with elderly patient, use for profile placeholders or empty states.
Person holding tablet, suitable for caregiver dashboard header background.

icons.style: Thin stroke, sharp edges, matched to typography weight.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native app. Ensure you are using NativeWind for Tailwind utility classes or map these design tokens into a StyleSheet/theme object.
Use 'react-native-reanimated' for the pulse animations and modal transitions.
For the trolley compartments grid, use a responsive flex wrap or grid layout that resembles a physical medicine box but styled with glassmorphism.
For glassmorphism in Expo, use 'expo-blur' (BlurView) positioned absolutely behind the transparent container with the borders.
Do NOT use pure #000000. Use the provided app_bg #020B14.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do not use generic Inter font for headings, implement the specified Rajdhani or a futuristic alternative available in Expo-fonts.
